message.content:
Remove unused code from redux ducks based on this list. For each file, read it first, then remove ONLY the unused items listed.

## src/redux/ducks/dacc/automaticDebt.ts
- Line 57: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/dacc/paymentChange.ts
- Lines 45-46: Remove unused `payload`, `callback`

## src/redux/ducks/downloadInvoice.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Line 17: Remove unused `data`
- Lines 75-78: Remove unused cpf, date, callBack, openFile

## src/redux/ducks/duplicateCard.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Lines 74, 83-84: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/example.ts
- Lines 73-74: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/exemptionEligibility.ts
- Line 26: Remove unused `response`

## src/redux/ducks/forgotPassword.ts
- Line 39: Remove unused `State`

## src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
- Lines 21-23: Remove unused Actions, data
- Lines 86-88: Remove unused GetMarketplaceActions, GetMarketplaceState

## src/redux/ducks/homeInvoices.ts
- Lines 16-19: Remove unused REQUEST_HOME_INVOICES, SUCCESS_HOME_INVOICES, FAILED_HOME_INVOICES, CLEAN_HOME_INVOICES
- Line 99: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/invoice.ts
- Lines 7-12: Remove unused REQUEST_FINTECH_INVOICE, SUCCESS_FINTECH_INVOICE, FAILED_FINTECH_INVOICE, CLEAN, REQUEST_FINTECH_INVOICE_DETAILS, CANCEL_REQUEST_FINTECH_INVOICE
- Lines 129-135: Remove unused parameters

## src/redux/ducks/invoices.ts
- Lines 17-20: Remove unused REQUEST_FINTECH_INVOICES, SUCCESS_FINTECH_INVOICES, FAILED_FINTECH_INVOICES, CLEAN
- Line 103: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/invoices/barcode.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Line 11: Remove unused `data`
- Lines 79-83: Remove unused parameters

## src/redux/ducks/invoicesList.ts
- Lines 5-12: Remove unused constants
- Lines 166-168: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/liveness.ts
- Lines 6-10: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR_ERROR, CLEAR
- Line 21: Remove unused `data`
- Line 84: Remove unused preview, callback

After making all changes, confirm what was removed.

content.text: I'll read each file and remove the unused code as specified. Let me start by reading all the files.
Now I have read all the files. Let me make the edits to remove the unused code from each file.
